docTitle: Alketab kalaban Peta · Alketab e Dhalem Settong Gulungan
metaDesc: Toro' garis bakto Parjanjiyan Lambe', odhi'na Isa, ban parjalananna Paulus e attassa peta se onggu — Alketab kadaddiyan e kennengngan se onggu badha.

s.kicker: Alketab e Dhalem Settong Gulungan · Peta
s.title: Alketab kalaban Peta
s.verse: “E bakto kaula malae ka sampeyan saponapa kamolja'anna parabuna Guste Isa Almasih se bakal dhateng, kaula sadaja ta' adhasar ka ngeng-dungngeng gabayanna manossa. Kaula sadaja ampon nengale dibi' kamolja'anna Almasih paneka.” (2 Petrus 1:16)
s.purpose: Alketab banne mitos. Paneka catetan parkara reng-oreng se ajalan e kennengngan, tanggal, ban nyama se onggu badha. Toro' jalan jareya e attassa peta, menorot orotan bakto — keddu' settong titik, otaba keddu' ▶ kaangguy ajalan settong-settong.
s.ot_kick: ① Parjanjiyan Lambe' — e saantero bakto
s.ot_h: Dhari penyepta'an sampe' mole ka Yerusalim
s.ot_lead: Banne settong parjalanan bai, tape alor sajara panyalamet molae dhari penyepta'an: penyepta'an ban aragana manossa → banjir ban Babel → panyaowan (Ibrahim) → nagara janji → kalowar dhari Messer → ara-ara → ngalla' tana → karaja'an → apesa → pambuwangan → mole.
s.je_lead: Toro' odhi'na Isa akadi se ecareta'agi Injil, noro' orotan — molae dhari kalaherranna e Betlehem lebat baptisan ban palajaran e Galilea, alengka Samaria, sampe' ka salib, odhi' pole, ban ongga ka sowarga e Yerusalim.
s.pa_h: Dhari Antiokia sampe' konco'na bume — Roma
s.pa_lead: Molae dhari Pentakosta e Yerusalim, kadi ponapa kabar bagus alebar ngalebbing Yudea — lebat Asia Kene' ban Eropa sampe' ka tengnga'na karaja'an. Pele settong dhari lema' parjalanan (kapeng 1·2·3 + parjalanan ka Roma + saellana epabebas) ban toro' kadaddiyan Caretana Para Rasul kalaban sorat-sorat se etoles e jalan.
s.foot: Sombber · Kennengngan-kennengngan noro' teks Alketab ban geografi Alketab se baku (kalaban nyama modheren mon abantu). Penggir tasek, songay, ban talaga egambar dhari data geografi se abukka' (Natural Earth), epasaderhana.

eden.name: Eden (Penyepta'an · Aragana Manossa)
eden.note: Ka dhalem dunnya se egabay ce' bagusna, dusa maso' ban mega' hubungan antara Allah ban manossa.
events: Penyepta'an nem are — “ce' bagusna”
Manossa egabay menorot tang-bayanganna Allah
Aragana manossa, ban eojuk dhari Eden
Janji kabar bagus se kapeng settong — “toronanna babine' bakal meccet cethagga olar”

noah.name: Ararat (Banjir)
noah.note: Allah ngokom dunnya se possa' dusa, tape ajaga odhi' lebat settong kalowarga.
events: Dunnya se possa' karusakan
Banjir, ban parao Nuh
Parjanjiyan pelangi — “ta' kera badha banjir pole se maancor dunnya”

babel.name: Manara Babel
babel.note: Ka adha'na kaangko'an se terro nyapa'a langnge', Allah macampor basana ban nyebbar bangsa-bangsa ka saantero bume.
events: “Mara maddek kotta ban manara… sopaja kaula sadaja kasohor”
Allah macampor basana
Bangsa-bangsa nyebbar ka saantero bume (Sinar — dha'-budhina Babil)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Careta panyalameddha Alketab molae dhari panyaowanna settong oreng.
events: Allah nyaowe Abram kalowar dhari Ur-Kasdim
“Ba'na bakal daddiya bangsa raja… sakabbinna bangsa eberkadi lebat ba'na”
Kalaban iman aba'na adina'agi nagarana

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: E dhalem parjalanan, nyaot panyaowan tojju ka nagara janji.
events: Kalowargana Terah ngennenge e Haran
Terah mate
Abram mangkat ka Kanaan e omor 75 taon

shechem.name: Sikhem · Kanaan
shechem.note: E nagara janji settong kalowarga epaddek ban parjanjiyan etarrosagi turun-tamurun.
events: Maso' Kanaan, mezba se kapeng settong — “ka toronanna ba'na Sengko' berri' tana reya”
Parjanjiyan (Kad 15) · Ishak · Yakub
Dhubellas ana'na Yakub — soko' dhubellas suku

egypt.name: Messer (Gosen)
egypt.note: Settong kalowarga daddi bangsa raja — pas daddi bangsa dunor.
events: Yusup, se ejuwal, epatenggi marenta Messer
Sakabbinna kalowargana Yakub toron kaangguy lopot dhari kalaparan
Bangsa Isra'il se sajan bannya' epadaddi dunor

sinai.name: Gunong Sinai
sinai.note: Panyalamet se paleng tengnga e Parjanjiyan Lambe' — dunor daddi bangsana Allah dibi'.
events: Sapolo balai ban budhu' Paska
Tasek Mera apesa ban reng-oreng alengka
Sapolo Hokom, Toret, kemah pasocce'an, ban kurban-kurban

kadesh.name: Kadesh (ara-ara)
kadesh.note: Ta' parcaja madaddi settong angkadan kaelangan tana jareya — tape Allah paggun asareng reng-oreng.
events: Dhubellas mata-mata — tape reng-oreng ta' endha' parcaja
38 taon e ara-ara — manna, gilingan ondhem ban apoy
E dhataran Moab, kotbah dha'-budhina Mosa (Ulangan)

jericho.name: Yerikho
jericho.note: Dha'-budhina reng-oreng maso' ban ngalla' nagara janji.
events: Songay Yordan apesa ban reng-oreng nyabrang
Geddhung Yerikho robbu
Ngalla' Kanaan ban magi tana

shiloh.name: Silo (Kim-hakim)
shiloh.note: Tadha' rato, saka' oreng ngalakone apa karebbanna — parlo rato se saongguna.
events: Kemah pasocce'an epaddek e Silo
Sikkellan dusa–katendhessan–panyalamet (Debora, Gidiyon, Simson)
Rut — kasetiya'an e jaman se petteng, e garis toronanna Daud

jerusalem.name: Yerusalim · Karaja'an Settong
jerusalem.note: Jaman masa Isra'il — ban janji rato se langgeng.
events: Saul rato se kapeng settong, pas Daud ban Goliyat
Parjanjiyan ka Daud — “tahtana ba'na salanjangnga” (2 Sam 7)
Sulaiman maddek padalemman socce e Yerusalim

samaria.name: Samaria · Karaja'an se Apesa
samaria.note: Karaja'an apesa ban toron sabatara para nabbi aerrak.
events: Saellana Sulaiman, apesa daddi Yehuda ban Isra'il
Panyemba'an brahala se li-baliyan
Eliya, Yesaya, Yermiya aerrak ‘mole’ — ban anebba'agi Almasih

nineveh.name: Niniwe (Asyur)
nineveh.note: Ngenneng saka' parengeddan, karaja'an dhaja robbu gallu.
events: Niniwe, kotta rajana Asyur
Karaja'an dhaja robbu ka Asyur (722 SM)
Yunus eotos ka Niniwe

babylon.name: Babil
babylon.note: Malem se paleng petteng — tape janji papole gi' badha.
events: Yerusalim robbu, padalemman socce kobbar (586 SM)
Yehuda eangko' ka Babil
Daniyel ban Yehezkiyel — iman ban pangaton e pambuwangan

susa.name: Susan (Persia)
susa.note: Maske e tengnga'na karaja'an kapir, Allah ajaga bangsana.
events: Persia makala Babil
Ester masalamet oreng Yahudi dhari karancakan
Nehemiya adu'a e adha'na rato ban eotos

return.name: Mole ka Yerusalim
return.note: Reng-oreng mole ban maddek pole — tape tadha' rato se dhateng. Reng-oreng anante' Almasih.
events: Tello galumbang papole lantaran parentana Kores (Zerubabel 538 · Ezra 458 · Nehemiya 444)
Padalemman socce epaddek pole ban geddhung Yerusalim epapole
Maleyaki — Parjanjiyan Lambe' notop: “Sengko' ngerema otosan”

bethlehem.name: Betlehem
bethlehem.note: Almasih se ejanji rabu ka kottana Daud — Dhabu se daddi manossa.
events: Lahir e Betlehem, kottana Daud
Kat-malaekat aberta'agi kabar ka reng-oreng ngowan dumba
Reng-oreng Majus dhateng nyemba

nazareth.name: Nazaret
nazareth.note: Allah araja daddi manossa e settong kotta se biyasa.
events: Epeyara e bengkona tokang kaju
E omor dhubellas taon, atanya ban nyaot e padalemman socce
Dha'-budhina etolak e sinagoga kampongnga dibi'

jordan.name: Songay Yordan
jordan.note: Palajaranna e adha'na oreng bannya' molae — sowarga noduwagi Salerana menangka Pottra.
events: Ebaptis bi' Yahya
Erroh toron akadi dara — “Reya Pottrana Sengko' se ekaase'e”
Makala tello coba'anna Setan e ara-ara

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: E tanda se kapeng settong Salerana noduwagi kaagunganna.
events: Daddi tamoy e settong pesta kabinan
Aeng eoba daddi anggur — tanda se kapeng settong
Red-moredda parcaja ka Salerana

sychar.name: Sikhar (Samaria)
sychar.note: Jalan palajaran se dhimin — lebat Yerusalim ban terros ka Samaria se eanggep enna.
events: Salerana maberse padalemman socce e Yerusalim
E baktona malem, Nikodemus — “Ba'na kodu elahirragi pole”
Aeng odhi' kaangguy settong babine' Samaria

capernaum.name: Kapernaum
capernaum.note: Pangkalan palajaran e Galilea — panyaowan, pangajaran, ban panolakan kabbi tapanggi e dinna'.
events: Nyaowe reng-oreng majala ban madaddi dinna' pangkalanna
Kotbah e Gunong — “Bagja oreng se mesken e adha'na Allah”
Parompama'an parkara karaja'an — ban panolakan se sajan kowat

galilee.name: Tasek Galilea
galilee.note: Kalaban kobasa ka alam Salerana noduwagi sapa Salerana.
events: “Anneng, ambu!” — Salerana maanneng angen raja
Aberri' ngakan 5.000 oreng kalaban lema' roti ban dhu' juko'
Ajalan e attassa aeng

caesarea_p.name: Kaisarea Pilipi
caesarea_p.note: Red-mored ngarte ja' Salerana Almasih, ban jalanna salib mokka'.
events: Pangakowanna Petrus — “Junandhalem Almasih, Pottrana Allah se odhi'”
Kapeng settong Salerana anebba'agi sedana ban odhi' polena
Aoba rupa kalaban kaagungan e gunong

jericho.name: Yerikho
jericho.note: E jalan ongga ka Yerusalim, Salerana nyare se elang.
events: Salerana mabaras matana Bartimeus se buta
Salerana nyaowe Zakheus tokang narek pajek
“Pottrana Manossa rabu nyare ban masalamet se elang”

bethany.name: Betania
bethany.note: Salerana noduwagi kobasa ka pate sabellunna minggu dha'-budhina.
events: Salerana maodhi' pole Lazarus dhari koburan — “Sengko' reya odhi' pole sarta odhi'”
Maria masapo minynya' ka Salerana kaangguy pangoburan
Tanda paneka sajan makowat rancana kaangguy mate'e Salerana

jerusalem.name: Yerusalim
jerusalem.note: Pucca' se etojju sakabbinna Alketab — salib, odhi' pole, ban ongga ka sowarga.
events: Maso' kalaban kamennangan; Salerana mabalik pole meja e padalemman socce
E Sarapan se Dha'-budhi Salerana ngoco' sokona red-mored
Salerana seda e salib
Odhi' pole e are se kapeng tello, pas ongga ka sowarga

antioch.name: Antiokia
antioch.note: Gareja pangotos, kennengnganna misi ka bangsa-bangsa laen molae ban mole.
events: E dhalem du'a Erroh masesa Barnabas ban Saulus
Gareja kennengnganna red-mored kapeng settong esebbut ‘Kristen’
Titik mola'na parjalanan kapeng settong, kapeng dhuwa', ban kapeng tello

seleucia.name: Seleukia
seleucia.note: Palabbuwanna Antiokia — reng-oreng alajar ka Siprus.

salamis.name: Salamis (Siprus)
salamis.note: Ambu kapeng settong e Siprus — anebba'agi e sinagoga.

paphos.name: Papos
paphos.note: Kobasa etoduwagi ka reng-oreng se nolak kabar bagus.
events: Elimas tokang sihir daddi buta
Sergius Paulus, gubernur jareya, parcaja
Molae dhari dinna' ‘Paulus’ se mimpin

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Palabbuwan e Pampilia — e dinna' Yahya Markus abali mole.

pantioch.name: Antiokia e Pisidia
pantioch.note: Kabar bagus abukka' amba tojju ka bangsa-bangsa laen.
events: Kotbah abit parkara sajara panyalamet e sinagoga
Bannya' bangsa laen perak ban narema Dhabuna Allah
Eojuk lantaran panolakan

iconium.name: Ikonium
iconium.note: Bannya' se parcaja, tape kasangsara'an maksa reng-oreng mangkat.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: Epoji akadi dewa, pas ebalang bato.
events: Mabaras oreng se empon dhari lahir
Oreng bannya' terro akurbana ka reng-oreng jareya akadi ka dewa
Ebalang bato ban edina akadi la mate, tape jaga

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Bannya' mored se ehaselagi; reng-oreng abali noro' jalan kaangguy makowat gareja.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Titik oba e mana kabar bagus kapeng settong tojju ka Eropa.
events: Pangaton parkara settong oreng Makedonia
“Alengka ka dhinna' ban tolong kaula sadaja”
Reng-oreng duli alengka ka Eropa

philippi.name: Pilipi
philippi.note: Gareja kapeng settong e Eropa — kabar bagus mennang maske e penjara.
events: Lidia, tokang juwal kaen ungu, parcaja
Settong dunor babine' tokang tennong ebebasagi
Nyanye tengnga malem, lendhu, ban saessena bengkona tokang jaga penjara salamet

thess.name: Tesalonika
thess.note: Dhabuna Allah ngeddek kotta ban panolakan sajan panas.
events: Acaca e sinagoga tello are Sabat
“Reng-oreng se malik-balik dunnya”
Reng-oreng mangkat neng-enneng e baktona malem

berea.name: Berea
berea.note: Reng-oreng se ‘bagus ate’ se mareksa Dhabuna Allah dibi'.
events: Reng-oreng narema Dhabuna Allah kalaban lellas ate
Saka' are mareksa Alketab kaangguy ngecek
Bannya' se daddi parcaja

athens.name: Atena
athens.note: E kottana para ahli pelsapat aba'na anebba'agi ‘sesemba'an se ta' ekennal’.
events: Sossa atena nangale kotta se possa' brahala
E Areopagus aba'na anebba'agi Allah Se Nyepta ban odhi' pole
Eco'-koco', tape badha pan-saponapa se parcaja

corinth.name: Korintus
corinth.note: Aba'na neng settong taon satengnga, namen gareja e kotta se possa' dusa.
events: Agabay kemah bareng Akwila ban Priskila
“Ja' tako'… sabab Sengko' asareng ba'na”
Bannya' oreng Korintus parcaja ban ebaptis

ephesus.name: Epesus
ephesus.note: Ate parjalanan kapeng tello — Dhabuna Allah alebar ka saantero Asia.
events: Ngajar saka' are dhu taon e balena Tiranus
Ketab-ketab sihir ekobbar; lalakon se possa' kobasa
Demetrius tokang salaka madaddi karusuhan

miletus.name: Miletus
miletus.note: Pamitan kalaban aeng mata ka para pinituwana Epesus.
events: “Openi gareja se ebelli Salerana kalaban dharana dibi'”
Para pinituwa nanges, tao ja' ta' bakal nangale aba'na pole

caesarea.name: Kaisarea
caesarea.note: Dhu taon abida aba'na abela kabar bagus e adha'na gubernur ban rato.
events: Eadili e adha'na gubernur Peliks ban Pestus
Pabelana e adha'na Rato Agripa
“Sengko' abanding ka Kaisar” — tojju ka Roma

jerusalem.name: Yerusalim
jerusalem.note: Ecekel e padalemman socce, jalanna menangka oreng tahanan molae.
events: Ecekel oreng bannya' e padalemman socce
Abela aba'na e adha'na Majelis Agama
Menangka warga Roma, ekerem kalaban pangawal ka Kaisarea

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Reng-oreng pindha ka kapal Aleksandria se tojju ka Roma.

fairhaven.name: Palabbuwan Bagus (Kreta)
fairhaven.note: Parengeddanna Paulus sopaja ambu alajar ta' etoro'.

crete.name: Kreta
crete.note: Saellana ebebasagi, polo kennengnganna aba'na adina'agi Titus kaangguy nata gareja.
events: Adina'agi Titus kaangguy nantowagi para pinituwa e saka' kotta
Nyo'on pamimpin se tadha' cala ban setiya
Noles sorat ka Titus

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Lebat angen raja ban kapal karem, janjina Allah paggun ekokowe.
events: Angen raja ‘dhaja-temor’ maancor kapal, tape 276 oreng kabbi salamet
Ekekke' olar mandi, aba'na ta' loka
Aba'na mabaras reng-oreng sake' e polo jareya

syracuse.name: Sirakusa
syracuse.note: Reng-oreng neng tello are e Sisilia.

puteoli.name: Putioli
puteoli.note: Reng-oreng napa' e Itali ban esambut sasama oreng parcaja.

rome.name: Roma
rome.book: Caretana Para Rasul 28 · Sorat-sorat Penjara · 2 Timotiyus
rome.note: Kabar bagus dha'-budhina napa' ka ate karaja'an — banne ahir tape mola'an.
events: Dhu taon e tahanan bengko, kalaban bangal anebba'agi Karaja'anna Allah
Dhari dinna' aba'na noles Sorat-sorat Penjara (Epesus·Pilipi·Kolosi·Pilemon)
Dha'-budhina epenjara pole, noles 2 Timotiyus ban daddi martir — “Sengko' la aperrang perrang se bagus, la mare palumba'an”
